name: Fastify TypeScript Backend for Chat Session, Folder & Document Management
goal: Design and implement a robust backend architecture using Fastify, TypeScript, Drizzle ORM, SQLite, and JWT-based authentication, compatible with frontend API/api1.ts for chat session, folder, and document management.

phases.title: Bootstrap & Configuration
phases.description: Initial setup of project structure, configs, and essential tooling.

steps.description: Initialize package.json, install dependencies, setup ESM/NodeNext, configure scripts.
Configure tsconfig.json for NodeNext, ESM, paths, and strict typing.
Create drizzle.config.ts for ORM and migrations.
Configure vitest for testing TypeScript modules.
Create src/app.ts as Fastify entrypoint, setup basic server.
Create src/config.ts for environment and app config.

phases.title: Domain Modeling & Database
phases.description: Design database schema for users, sessions, folders, documents. Setup ORM.

steps.description: Design src/db/schema.ts for users, sessions, folders, documents.
Setup src/db/client.ts for Drizzle ORM and SQLite connection.
Add migration scripts and instructions for schema evolution.

phases.title: Authentication & Authorization
phases.description: Implement JWT-based authentication, user management, and middleware.

steps.description: Implement src/auth/service.ts for user login, signup, JWT issuing.
Implement src/auth/jwt-middleware.ts for Fastify JWT validation.
Create src/auth/utils.ts for helper functions (token, password hash).
Implement src/routes/auth.ts for login, signup, token refresh endpoints.

phases.title: API Endpoints
phases.description: Implement REST endpoints for chat sessions, folders, documents, aligned with frontend contract.

steps.description: Implement src/routes/sessions.ts for chat session CRUD, user scoping.
Implement src/routes/folders.ts for folder CRUD, user scoping, align with BASE_URL_FOLDERS.
Implement src/routes/documents.ts for document CRUD, align with BASE_URL_DOCS.
Define src/types/api.d.ts for endpoint request/response types matching frontend contract.

phases.title: Integration & Middleware
phases.description: Integrate routes, error handling, logging, and CORS.

steps.description: Register all routes in src/app.ts, setup CORS, error handling, logging.
Implement centralized error handler for API responses.

phases.title: Testing & Validation
phases.description: Write unit and integration tests for auth, domain, and API endpoints.

steps.description: Write src/auth/service.test.ts and src/routes/auth.test.ts for authentication flows.
Write tests for session, folder, document routes and DB logic.

phases.title: Security & Production Hardening
phases.description: Apply security best practices, optimize performance, and prepare for deployment.

steps.description: Validate environment variables and secrets in src/config.ts.
Add Fastify rate-limiting plugin for API protection.
Add security headers and CORS configuration.

files.purpose: Dependency management, scripts, ESM setup.
files.notes: Must specify type: module, scripts for dev/test, Fastify/Drizzle dependencies.

files.purpose: TypeScript configuration for NodeNext, ESM, strict typing.
files.notes: Set module: NodeNext, target: ES2022+, paths for src/*, include tests.

files.purpose: Environment variable template for DB, JWT secret, etc.
files.notes: Should include DB path, JWT secret, CORS origins.

files.purpose: Ignore node_modules, build, .env, SQLite DB.
files.notes: Prevent sensitive files from being committed.

files.purpose: Drizzle ORM configuration for migrations and DB connection.
files.notes: Should reference SQLite DB file, migration folder.

files.purpose: Vitest configuration for TypeScript tests.
files.notes: Should include src/, test files, setup for ESM.

files.purpose: Fastify server entrypoint, route registration, middleware.
files.notes: ESM import, register routes, error handling, CORS, logging.

files.purpose: App configuration, environment variable parsing.
files.notes: Validate required envs, export config object.

files.purpose: Drizzle ORM schema for users, sessions, folders, documents.
files.notes: Should be normalized, support user scoping, migration ready.

files.purpose: Drizzle ORM client setup, SQLite connection.
files.notes: Singleton export, use config for DB path.

files.purpose: Authentication logic, user CRUD, JWT issuing.
files.notes: Should hash passwords, validate credentials, issue JWT.

files.purpose: JWT validation middleware for Fastify.
files.notes: Should verify token, attach user info to request.

files.purpose: Helper functions for auth (hash, token generation).
files.notes: Reusable, pure functions.

files.purpose: Auth endpoints: login, signup, token refresh.
files.notes: POST /login, /signup, /refresh; align with frontend headers.

files.purpose: Chat session CRUD endpoints.
files.notes: User-scoped, align with frontend contract, validate X-User-Id.

files.purpose: Folder CRUD endpoints.
files.notes: User-scoped, align with BASE_URL_FOLDERS, validate headers.

files.purpose: Document CRUD endpoints.
files.notes: User-scoped, align with BASE_URL_DOCS, validate headers.

files.purpose: API request/response types matching frontend contract.
files.notes: Should match frontend API/api1.ts, include userId, session, folder, document types.

files.purpose: Fastify type augmentation for custom properties.
files.notes: Extend FastifyRequest with user info.

files.purpose: Vendor type overrides if needed.
files.notes: For third-party module typings.

files.purpose: Unit tests for auth service logic.
files.notes: Test signup, login, JWT issuing, password hashing.

files.purpose: Integration tests for auth endpoints.
files.notes: Test login/signup flows, token refresh.

files.purpose: Tests for session endpoints.
files.notes: CRUD, user scoping, error cases.

files.purpose: Tests for folder endpoints.
files.notes: CRUD, user scoping, error cases.

files.purpose: Tests for document endpoints.
files.notes: CRUD, user scoping, error cases.

files.purpose: Migration script for DB schema evolution.
files.notes: Should use Drizzle migration API, run via npm script.

notes: Backend must be ESM (NodeNext), use Fastify (not Express), and strictly align API endpoints and headers with frontend contract (API/api1.ts). All endpoints must validate user identity via headers (X-User-Id, user-id, user_id). Database schema must support user scoping for sessions, folders, and documents. Security, error handling, and testing are critical. Migration scripts and environment validation are required for production readiness.
